{{Quote|Spare parts available.|2-1C|audio=sparepartsdroid.flac|<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref>}}
The '''2-1C medical droid''' was a combat medic droid employed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was extremely similar in design to the [[FX-series medical assistant droid/Legends|FX-series medical assistant droid]], but was designed for independent operation on the battlefield. It had a working [[Vocabulator/Legends|vocabulator]] and a cruel, cynical attitude, a stark contrast to the eager, friendly [[IM-6 Battlefield Medical Droid/Legends|IM-6 units]] used by the previous [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].

==Behind the scenes==
2-1C was also a non-playable character in [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]]. It was voiced by [[Harvey Jason]]. It is unknown whether this model of 2-1C matched the one in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''.

Like all the medical droids used by the Empire in ''Galactic Battlegrounds'', the 2-1C have a sadistic love of torturous surgery.

The 2-1C droids in ''Galactic Battlegrounds'' were voiced by [[Ethan Phillips]].
